mapper.select: SELECT ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , VIEW_CNT , TO_CHAR(CRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_DT , TO_CHAR(MDFY_DT , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MDFY_DT , FILE_NAME , ORIGIN_FILE_NAME FROM BOARD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPRING_BOOT.BOARD (ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , VIEW_CNT , CRT_DT , MDFY_DT , FILE_NAME , ORIGIN_FILE_NAME) VALUES ('BO-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_BOARD_PK.NEXTVAL, 6,'0') , #{subject} , #{content} , #{email} , 0 , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , NULL , NULL)
